summary.en: South African BESS installations may need local building, electrical, fire, insurer, and project-owner review. The safety package should address installation location, enclosure rating, ventilation, thermal-runaway mitigation, separation distances, emergency shutdown, warning labels, access for firefighters, and electrical certificate-of-compliance expectations. Requirements vary by municipality, premises type, system size, and indoor or outdoor installation.
summary.zh: 南非BESS安装可能需要地方建筑、电气、消防、保险方和项目业主审查。安全资料包应覆盖安装位置、外壳等级、通风、热失控缓解、间距、紧急停机、警示标签、消防人员通道以及电气合格证明要求。要求会随市政辖区、场所类型、系统规模以及室内或室外安装而变化。
summary.zht: 南非BESS安裝可能需要地方建築、電氣、消防、保險方和項目業主審查。安全資料包應覆蓋安裝位置、外殼等級、通風、熱失控緩解、間距、緊急停機、警示標籤、消防人員通道以及電氣合格證明要求。要求會隨市政轄區、場所類型、系統規模以及室內或室外安裝而變化。

standards_or_laws: Local authority fire-safety and building-control review where applicable
Electrical installation certificate-of-compliance requirements where applicable
Project-owner, insurer, and site emergency-response requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project fire-review documentation for stationary energy storage. These documents can support technical review but do not replace South African site approval, electrical sign-off, insurer review, or local fire-authority expectations. A proposed update to GB/T 36558-2023 with a claimed 2024-07-01 implementation date was not verified against an official source for this row, so the existing 2022 reference is retained.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查文件管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能替代南非现场批准、电气签核、保险方审查或地方消防主管要求。关于GB/T 36558-2023及其声称2024-07-01实施日期的拟议更新，本行未能通过官方来源核验，因此保留现有2022引用。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查文件管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能替代南非現場批准、電氣簽核、保險方審查或地方消防主管要求。關於GB/T 36558-2023及其聲稱2024-07-01實施日期的擬議更新，本行未能通過官方來源核驗，因此保留現有2022引用。

gap.en: The gap is installation evidence. Exporters should provide site-specific drawings, clearances, ventilation or gas-management evidence where relevant, emergency shutdown logic, fire detection and suppression interface details, maintenance instructions, local-language emergency procedures, and commissioning records.
gap.zh: 差距在于安装证据。出口商应提供项目现场图纸、间距、适用时的通风或气体管理证据、紧急停机逻辑、火灾探测和灭火接口细节、维护说明、当地语言应急程序以及调试记录。
gap.zht: 差距在於安裝證據。出口商應提供項目現場圖紙、間距、適用時的通風或氣體管理證據、緊急停機邏輯、火災探測和滅火接口細節、維護說明、當地語言應急程序以及調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local building, electrical, fire, insurer, or project approval requires it; otherwise project-specific safety due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Battery test reports alone do not close South African installation risk. Prepare a site-specific fire and electrical safety package before installation and commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电池测试报告本身不能覆盖南非安装风险。安装和调试前应准备项目现场消防及电气安全资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電池測試報告本身不能覆蓋南非安裝風險。安裝和調試前應準備項目現場消防及電氣安全資料包。
